creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Voila!

This moves us ahead by some seventeen(!) snapshots and nine months of
upstream development work.


If you want to help move this and Wine on FreeBSD forward
 - file a distinct bug report against LLVM based on comment #6 
   (which is about building on i386), or
 - see to move this port forward to version 8.12 or 8.13 (on amd64).
